[[BLOCK:srt_266]]
Speaker 2: I’d also like to add one more thing. We all know that many of our students here today wouldn’t have come this far without the support of their families. So I’d like to offer my heartfelt congratulations to all the family members who dedicated their time and effort to making this important moment possible.

[[BLOCK:srt_267]]
Speaker 3: All right, I think that wraps up our interview.

[[BLOCK:srt_268]]
Speaker 3: You probably need to get to your next meeting.

[[BLOCK:srt_269]]
Speaker 2: Yes, of course.

[[BLOCK:srt_270]]
Speaker 2: Once we add this segment to what I said earlier, the video should be about ten minutes long. Yes, that should be fine.
